scenarios.description: load returns DotenvImpl with one file entry when systemProperties=false (branch-false, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Create temporary directory with .env containing a single line 'KEY=VALUE'; use real DotenvReader and DotenvParser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv contains entry KEY=VALUE; System.getProperty("KEY") remains null
pseudocode:
GIVEN
  File tmpDir contains .env with content 'KEY=VALUE'; DotenvBuilder b = Dotenv.configure().directory(tmpDir)

scenarios.description: load sets system properties for multiple entries when systemProperties=true (branch-true, loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: Create temporary directory with .env containing multiple lines 'A=1' and 'B=2'; use real DotenvReader and DotenvParser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv contains entries A=1 and B=2; System.getProperty("A")=='1' and System.getProperty("B")=='2'
pseudocode:
GIVEN
  File tmpDir contains .env with 'A=1' and 'B=2'; DotenvBuilder b = Dotenv.configure().directory(tmpDir).systemProperties()

THEN
  assert dt.get("A").equals("1"); assert dt.get("B").equals("2"); assert System.getProperty("A").equals("1");

scenarios.description: load throws DotenvException when .env is missing and throwIfMissing=true (exception)
scenarios.precondition: Use a directory without .env; default builder (throwIfMissing=true, throwIfMalformed=true)
pseudocode:
GIVEN
  File tmpDir contains no .env; DotenvBuilder b = Dotenv.configure().directory(tmpDir)

scenarios.description: load returns empty Dotenv when .env is missing and ignoreIfMissing() applied (branch-false, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Use a directory without .env; builder.ignoreIfMissing() to prevent exception
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv with no entries; System.getenv unaffected
pseudocode:
GIVEN
  File tmpDir contains no .env; DotenvBuilder b = Dotenv.configure().directory(tmpDir).ignoreIfMissing()

scenarios.description: load throws DotenvException on malformed .env when throwIfMalformed=true (exception)
scenarios.precondition: Create directory with .env containing invalid line 'INVALIDLINE'; default builder
pseudocode:
GIVEN
  File tmpDir contains .env with content 'INVALIDLINE'; DotenvBuilder b = Dotenv.configure().directory(tmpDir)

scenarios.description: load skips malformed entries and returns valid ones when ignoreIfMalformed() applied (branch-false, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Create directory with .env containing 'GOOD=1' and 'BADLINE'; builder.ignoreIfMalformed()
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv contains only GOOD=1; no exception
pseudocode:
GIVEN
  File tmpDir contains .env with 'GOOD=1' and 'BADLINE'; DotenvBuilder b = Dotenv.configure().directory(tmpDir).ignoreIfMalformed()

scenarios.description: load with ignoreIfMalformed() and systemProperties=true applies only valid entries to system properties (branch-true, loop-1)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv contains X=Y; System.getProperty("X")=="Y"; no exception
pseudocode:
GIVEN
  File tmpDir contains .env with 'X=Y' and 'INVALID'; DotenvBuilder b = Dotenv.configure().directory(tmpDir).ignoreIfMalformed().systemProperties()
